name: chatbot-code
description: ``` etisora-chatbot/ ├── .env.example      ← copy to .env and fill in your keys ├── chatbot.js        ← core conversation logic (state machine) ├── openai.js         ← OpenAI integration (fallback + rephrasing) ├── sheets.js         ← Google Sheets integration (saves inquiries) ├── index.js          ← terminal runner (for local testing) ├── server.js         ← Express API server (for your website) └── package.json ```
